parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor in a real kitchen setting. The tablet displays an AI avatar, but the primary video is human-recorded.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Long blonde hair, dark eyebrows, and dark eye makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with a yellow graphic design.
characters.demeanor: Initially frustrated, then engaged and happy.

characters.appearance: Digital avatar of a young female with red hair.
characters.wardrobe: Not clearly visible, appears to be a light-colored top.

scenes.setting: A modern kitchen with white cabinets and a dark granite countertop. A stainless steel sink is in the foreground. A tablet is propped up on the counter next to the sink.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is standing at a kitchen sink, washing dishes. She is holding a soapy sponge and a pan. A tablet is resting on the counter to her left, displaying Character B. Character A interacts with the tablet while continuing to wash dishes. She looks frustrated at first, then smiles as she successfully answers the prompts. The lighting is bright and natural.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman washing dishes while using a language learning app on a tablet. The app features an AI avatar that prompts her with questions in Japanese. The woman struggles at first but then successfully answers with the app's help. Text overlays show the Japanese phrases and their English translations.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 日本語が嫌い。
[I hate Japanese.]
Character B says: あなたの日本語レベルは？
[What's your Japanese level?]
Character A says: わからない。
[I don't know.]
Character B says: 「わからない」と言ってください。
[Say "Wakaranai"]
Character A says: わからない。
[I don't know.]
Character B says: 日本語を話せますか？
[Can you speak Japanese?]
Character A says: はい、わたし…
[Yes, I...]
Character B says: はい、話せますと言ってください。
[Please say, "I can speak."]
Character A says: はい、話せます。
[Yes, I can.]
Character B says: 何歳ですか？
[How old are you?]
Character A says: わたし…にじゅうよん…？
[I... twenty-four...?]
Character B says: 二十四歳ですと言ってください。
[Please say, "I am 24 years old."]
Character A says: 二十四歳です。
[I am 24 years old.]
Character A says: How can I practice my Japanese every day?
Character B says: Just download Praktika.
Character A says: I'll download Praktika right now!
scenes.on_screen_text:

Nihongo kirai.
I hate Japanese.
あなたの日本語レベルは？
Anata no Nihongo reberu wa?
What's your Japanese level?
わからない。
Wakaranai.
I don't know.
「わからない」と言ってください。
Wakaranai to itte kudasai.
Say "Wakaranai"
わからない。
Wakaranai.
I don't know.
日本語を話せますか？
Nihongo wo hanasemasu ka?
Can you speak Japanese?
はい、わたし…
Hai, watashi...
Yes, I...
はい、話せますと言ってください。
Hai, hanasemasu to itte kudasai
Please say, "I can speak."
はい、話せます。
Hai, hanasemasu.
Yes, I can.
何歳ですか？
Nan-sai desu ka?
How old are you?
わたし…にじゅうよん…？
Watashi... nijuyon...?
I... twenty-four...?
二十四歳ですと言ってください。
Nijūyon-sai desu to itte kudasai.
Please say, "I am 24 years old."
二十四歳です。
Nijūyon-sai desu.
I am 24 years old.
How can I practice my Japanese every day?
Just download Praktika.
I'll download Praktika right now!
